rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: Entrance hall presented in good decorative order throughout, finished with emulsioned walls in white/magnolia and grey tones, oak-effect engineered flooring, white woodwork and a walnut-veneered timber entrance door with brass-effect ironmongery. The hall incorporates a built-in storage/wardrobe recess and integrated smart-home control panel. Walls carry scattered scuff marks and minor surface marks at low to mid level consistent with light wear; flooring and joinery are otherwise sound. Cleaning to a domestic standard required, with dust noted within the storage recess.

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: Hallway/lobby area leading to a walk-in wardrobe within a bedroom. The space is presented in good decorative order with painted walls in white and grey-blue tones, oak-effect laminate to the hall and grey fitted carpet to the wardrobe area. Walls show light scuffs and scratch marks in places; carpet shows shading/foot traffic marks. The fitted wardrobe is grey wood-effect with chrome hinges, fitted with shelving and hanging rails, and contains the tenant's hangers and bedding.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: Open-plan reception and kitchen in a modern high-specification apartment, presented in good decorative order with contemporary furnishings. The kitchen is fitted with a full suite of integrated Miele appliances and stone surfaces. The room is generally clean to a domestic standard, though the grey velvet upholstered sofa shows notable water/shade marking across the seat and arms, and one hinge plate to a utility door is damaged. Outlook is over an active construction site.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: A modern double bedroom decorated in emulsioned magnolia/off-white walls with grey carpet throughout, furnished with an upholstered bed and matching textured bedside chests. The room is generally in good decorative order presented to a domestic standard, however a number of localised defects were noted including a mark to the mattress border, a stain to the wall above the headboard, scuffs to walls and skirting, and tarnishing/smearing to the black nickel switch plates. Overall sound with light wear consistent with occupation.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A modern, high-specification bathroom finished with white gloss wall tiling and dark grey marble-effect floor tiling. The room comprises a panelled bath with shower over and glass screen, a wall-hung WC with concealed cistern, a solid-surface wall-mounted basin with mirrored cabinet, and a black towel rail. Generally presented in good to excellent order and cleaned to a domestic standard, with some isolated defects including a damaged threshold/bath seal and limescale to chrome ware.

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: A modern external balcony situated on an upper floor of a contemporary apartment block, overlooking an active construction site and rail/road infrastructure. The balcony is finished with grey composite decking, black powder-coated metal balustrade railings, and is accessed via aluminium-framed sliding doors. The space is well maintained and appears recently constructed with light surface debris only.

defects: light surface debris and small white spots scattered mid level to deck
minor dust and grit to board grooves

defects: light dust to bars and handrail

defects: light surface marking low level to render
